name: Follow Up
description: Professional follow-up with urgency and action
subject: Follow-Up: [Previous Topic]
body:
Hi [Name],

I wanted to reach out and follow up on our previous conversation regarding [Previous Topic].

As discussed, [Brief Summary] is critical for [Objective]. I believe we can move forward efficiently by [Next Action].

To keep momentum, I propose we:
• [Action 1] by [Date 1]
• [Action 2] by [Date 2]
• [Action 3] by [Date 3]

Would this timeline work for your team?

I'm excited about the potential here and look forward to your thoughts.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
